{"society_power": 2.5, "state_power": 8.5, "society_change": -5.0, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "1973 coup crushes society, builds despotic state", "reasoning": "Peak mobilization (1970\u201373) collapsed into the 1973 coup, whose repression\u2014banned parties, dissolved Congress, DINA\u2014atomized civil society (only the Vicar\u00eda surviving), while the Pinochet regime built an unaccountable despotic state with pervasive coercive reach despite a shrinking economic footprint."}
